sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18373" key="a)filo/storgos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλό-στοργος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without natural affection,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">140d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
